sql: WITH base AS (SELECT ct.net_sol AS net, gm.liquidity_sol_t30 AS liq, gm.holder_count AS hc, gm.top5_wallet_pct AS t5, gm.dev_wallet_pct AS dev FROM copy_trades ct JOIN graduations g ON g.mint=ct.mint JOIN graduation_momentum gm ON gm.graduation_id=g.id WHERE ct.strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m' AND ct.status='closed' AND ct.net_sol IS NOT NULL) SELECT '1_winloss' AS section, CASE WHEN net>0 THEN 'win' ELSE 'loss' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN net>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END),3) AS win_rate, ROUND(SUM(net),3) AS tot_net, ROUND(AVG(net),4) AS avg_net, ROUND(AVG(liq),1) AS f_liq, ROUND(AVG(hc),1) AS f_holders, ROUND(AVG(t5),1) AS f_top5, ROUND(AVG(dev),2) AS f_dev FROM base GROUP BY bucket UNION ALL SELECT '2_liq', CASE WHEN liq IS NULL THEN 'z_null' WHEN liq<40 THEN 'a_lt40' WHEN liq<70 THEN 'b_40_70' WHEN liq<120 THEN 'c_70_120' ELSE 'd_ge120' END, COUNT(*), ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN net>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END),3), ROUND(SUM(net),3), ROUND(AVG(net),4), NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM base GROUP BY 2 UNION ALL SELECT '3_holders', CASE WHEN hc IS NULL THEN 'z_null' WHEN hc<50 THEN 'a_lt50' WHEN hc<150 THEN 'b_50_150' WHEN hc<250 THEN 'c_150_250' ELSE 'd_ge250' END, COUNT(*), ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN net>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END),3), ROUND(SUM(net),3), ROUND(AVG(net),4), NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM base GROUP BY 2 UNION ALL SELECT '4_top5', CASE WHEN t5 IS NULL THEN 'z_null' WHEN t5<15 THEN 'a_lt15' WHEN t5<25 THEN 'b_15_25' WHEN t5<40 THEN 'c_25_40' ELSE 'd_ge40' END, COUNT(*), ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN net>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END),3), ROUND(SUM(net),3), ROUND(AVG(net),4), NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM base GROUP BY 2 UNION ALL SELECT '5_dev', CASE WHEN dev IS NULL THEN 'z_null' WHEN dev<1 THEN 'a_lt1' WHEN dev<3 THEN 'b_1_3' WHEN dev<5 THEN 'c_3_5' ELSE 'd_ge5' END, COUNT(*), ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN net>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END),3), ROUND(SUM(net),3), ROUND(AVG(net),4), NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM base GROUP BY 2 ORDER BY 1,2
